allow: Bash(find "C:/Espressif" -maxdepth 4 -type d -name "esp-idf" 2>/dev/null; find "C:/Espressif" -maxdepth 4 -type d -name "frameworks" 2>/dev/null; find "C:/Users/Admin" -maxdepth 3 -type d -name "esp-idf*" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort '\\''COM3'\\'',115200,'\\''None'\\'',8,'\\''One'\\''; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $port.RtsEnable=$true; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $port.RtsEnable=$false; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $timeout=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $timeout\) { if\($port.BytesToRead -gt 0\) { Write-Host -NoNewline $port.ReadExisting\(\) } Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200 }; $port.Close\(\)')
